## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Page URL
Where did you find this issue? (e.g., docs/guides/extension-architecture.md)

## Expected Behavior
What should happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens?

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
